conditions.evidence_text: At the composition of 57/43 (v/v) CH2Cl2 /CH3CN, all the PS standards are eluted as a single peak. This is the chromatographic critical point or the adsorption-size exclusion transition point where the enthalpic and entropic terms in Eq. (2) compensate each other. This compensation results in the loss of separation selectivity according to the polymer molecular weight, and all the PS standards are eluted near the injection solvent peak position regardless of their molecular weights.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Chromatographic critical point where enthalpic and entropic terms compensate, resulting in loss of separation selectivity according to molecular weight
conditions.physical_address: Department of Chemistry and Polymer Research Institute, POSTECH, Pohang, 790-784 KOREA
conditions.notes: Also observed at 30.5 C with fixed composition 57/43 in Fig 3.
